title.en: Ye Tian took a deep breath and said.

content.en:
"Thirty million years of the Dao Era, it can finally be regarded as creating a perfect superdimensional Dao inheritance!"

Ye Tian took a deep breath and said.

He had now created a Perfect Extradimensional Dao Seed Inheritance, and if he immediately impacted the Half-Step Extradimensional Realm, he would definitely be able to condense the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Seed.

Subsequently, he gave this perfect extradimensional Dao species a name - Shipan Dao Species!

After all, he used the Jialan stone plate to promote the performance, and the name was reasonable.

After the creation of the Shimapan Dao Seed Inheritance, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about the Super Dimensional Dao Seed Inheritance, as long as he wanted to break through in the future, he could break through.

And in such a long time, the human race has given birth to many peak realm gods.

But unfortunately, the consumption of human resources is very serious, and too many people stay in the boundary of the rift, which makes the boundary of the boundary gap become crowded.

The point is that the extradimensional storm even affected the birth of the "497" realm resources of the Boundary Rift.

As for the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, there are no resources to be born, except for the area shrouded by the Extradimensional Formation, other places have been turned into ruins, and even the entire Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm are full of holes.

"The damage caused by the extradimensional storm to the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory is too great, and it will be difficult for the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm to recover for a long time in the next few years, and the impact on ordinary beings is too great. Even in the realm of the boundary rift, it will be difficult to generate large resources frequently in the future. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

It can be said that once the extradimensional storm disappears, the supreme forces and those top forces that survived can only maintain their strength in a short period of time and cannot continue to improve.

However, this is also something that cannot be helped.

Extradimensional storms are catastrophic, inevitable things.

If it weren't for the sale of the extradimensional formation by the Galanbol Ship, more creatures would have fallen, and even many supreme forces would have been destroyed.

"It's been half an extradimensional era, I wonder how long this extradimensional storm will last?"

Ye Tian waited silently.

His strength was also rapidly improving, and he felt that with his growth rate, perhaps after the extradimensional storm was over, there might be hope that he would be able to condense the thirteenth Eternal Realm Spirit.

After all, he had comprehended the true superdimensional power, and his cultivation was naturally very fast.

......

Terran Temple.

Ye Xingchen came to meet Ye Tian.

"Father, I want to fuse extradimensional things!"

Ye Xingchen said.

Ye Tian looked at Ye Xingchen, and naturally knew why Ye Xingchen had this idea, because the human race had already given birth to many peak realm gods, and some of them were beginning to try to fuse the fragments of low-level extradimensional things.

In addition, he has created a lot of secret techniques, which are placed in the Terran Temple, which can be exchanged by any peak realm god, and those secret techniques can help fuse extradimensional things.

Of course, even so, it was still very difficult to fuse, and not necessarily one of the ten peak realm gods would be able to fuse successfully, and it would take countless years.

That is to say, Ye Tian will let them exchange the various experiences of fusing extradimensional things at a very low price, otherwise the success rate will be even lower.

However, there is still a human race peak realm god fusion successfully.

Once the extra-dimensional thing is fused, the extra-dimensional thing can be used to urge the extra-dimensional power contained in the extra-dimensional thing, and the combat power will be very terrifying.

No matter how strong Ye Xingchen's foundation is, he may not be able to defeat the peak realm god who has fused extradimensional things in the human race.

Therefore, Ye Xingchen wanted to fuse extra-dimensional things, otherwise his own strength would soon be unable to defeat the descendants of the human race, and he would naturally be very embarrassed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian thought about it and agreed.

Although the body will bear the assimilation of the extradimensional object after fusing the extradimensional thing, if you want to comprehend the true extradimensional power, the fusion of the extradimensional thing is an indispensable link.

After all, once you fuse the extradimensional things, you will have a little understanding of the superdimensional power over a long period of time.

If you don't even fuse extradimensional things, then there is no hope of comprehending the power of extradimensionality.

"I now have comprehended the true power of extradimensionality, and I have the Garan Stone Disk, which can deduce some secret techniques to suppress extradimensional assimilation, so that the stars will not suffer the pain of extradimensional assimilation. And in the future, as long as you comprehend the true extradimensional power, then all side effects will no longer exist. "

It was precisely because of this that he would agree to Ye Xingchen's fusion of extradimensional things.

Ye Tian chose the most suitable extra-dimensional thing for his son-Galaxy Stone, this extra-dimensional thing is a low-level extra-dimensional thing, and it is only a fragment, and it is not difficult to fuse.

With his assistance, it won't be long before Ye Xingchen can successfully fuse.

"Thank you, father!"

Ye Xingchen was excited.

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to assist Ye Xingchen in fusing the extradimensional things of the Galaxy Stone, and it took a long time and experienced more than a dozen failures before the fusion was successful0 .

And the fusion failed, the body was injured, and the resources consumed to repair the injuries were also unimaginable to ordinary peak realm gods.

It's just that Ye Tiancai is generous, so he doesn't care.

After fusing the extra-dimensional object Xinghe Stone, Ye Tian personally used the Jialan Stone Disk to deduce and create a super-dimensional technique suitable for the Xinghe Stone, and directly passed it to Ye Xingchen, so that Ye Xingchen did not need to create the extra-dimensional technique himself, and he could directly practice these extra-dimensional techniques.

After mastering these super-dimensional treasures, Ye Xingchen's strength had skyrocketed, and coupled with the large number of super-dimensional secret treasures given by Ye Tian, his combat power was no less than that of the gods of the Liangyi Realm.

this day. []

A peak realm god of the supreme force Taiqiong Mountain sent a message for help.

Taiqiong Mountain is on the weaker side among the supreme forces, and several of the more powerful peak realm gods have all purchased the Jialanbao ship and left.

Today's Taiqiong Mountain is very weak, and this time Taiqiong Mountain is asking for help because their extra-dimensional formation is about to shatter.

"Taiqiong Mountain's extra-dimensional formation is about to shatter?"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

It stands to reason that the extra-dimensional formation that Taiqiong Mountain purchased from the Galanbao ship was able to withstand the extra-dimensional storm and not shatter.

But if you think about it carefully, there is only one reason, and that is that the materials of the formation are not qualified, such as the lack of some materials and the replacement of other materials, resulting in this extradimensional formation not being so strong.

After all, not all supreme forces are rich enough to get all the 1.6 materials.

The human race has nothing to do with Taiqiong Mountain, so naturally it has nothing to do with it.

It was impossible for Taiqiongshan to come to ask for help, so he had to go to the rescue immediately.

So, Ye Tian directly refused.

......

Taiqiong Mountain.

At this time, the peak realm gods had already received Ye Tian's reply, and they were all in a very bad mood.

"The Ye Heavenly Realm God refused!"

"I have already guessed that at this time, it is normal for the Ye Heavenly Realm God not to come to save us, but we have already asked for help from other supreme forces, and the other supreme forces have no way to save us, only the Ye Heavenly Realm God may have a way. This time, he is refusing, not being unable to save us. "

"But how can you convince the Ye Heavenly Realm God, what can we get from Taiqiong Mountain?"

Suddenly.

One of the pinnacle realm gods said, "Why don't you take out that thing?"
